properties./Dataset_Title: Development of an Artificial Intelligence Algorithm for the interpretation of Prostatic Magnetic Resonance Imaging (PAIMRI)
properties./Dataset_Description: The main objective of PAIMRI research is the development of a tool to assist in the diagnosis of postate cancer in MRI based on AI (deep neural network).

properties.log_message: Reading curated csv from staging and applying structural mapping
Error writing mapped values to ingestion DB

properties.mapping Procedure2_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'RHB_CODE_BIOPSIE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"RHB_CODE_BIOPSIE" AS originalValue,
		'Procedure2_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure2_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Tumor:
SELECT 	"Tumor_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Tumor_BodySite_Code" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"RHB_SITE_BIOPSIE" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySite_LateralityQualifier" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierEUCAIM,
		"RHB_LAT_BIOPSIE" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySite_LocationQualifier" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierEUCAIM,
		"RHB_LOC_BIOPSIE" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierOriginal,
		1 AS Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"I_CATEGORY_PATIENT" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS DiagnosticCategoryEucaim,
		"I_SEXE_PATIENT" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		"Patient_ManagingOrganization" AS ManagingOrganization,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Procedure1_Identifier" AS ProcedureIdentifier,
		1 as ImagingTimepoint,
		"Procedure1_Code" AS	ImagingProcedureEUCAIM,
        "VI_IRMMP_CODE" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		1 as Episode,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Procedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'VI_IRMMP_CODE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"VI_IRMMP_CODE" AS originalValue,
		'Procedure1_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure1_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'ICDO_HMB_CODE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"ICDO_HMB_CODE" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehavior' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehavior" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'I_SEXE_PATIENT' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"I_SEXE_PATIENT" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite_LocationQualifier:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'RHB_LOC_BIOPSIE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"RHB_LOC_BIOPSIE" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySite_LocationQualifier' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySite_LocationQualifier" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'ICD10_CODE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"ICD10_CODE" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_DiagnosticCategory:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'I_CATEGORY_PATIENT' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"I_CATEGORY_PATIENT" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_DiagnosticCategory' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Procedure2:
SELECT 	"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Procedure2_Identifier" AS ProcedureIdentifier,
		"Procedure2_Code" AS	procedureeucaim,
        "RHB_CODE_BIOPSIE" AS procedureoriginal,
		"Procedure2_PerformedDate" AS performeddate,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:PrimaryCancerCondition:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AssertedDate" AS AssertedDate,
		"RHB_SITE_BIOPSIE" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySite_Code" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS primarycancerconditioneucaim,
		"ICD10_CODE" AS primarycancerconditionoriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehavior" AS histologymorphologybehavioureucaim,
		"ICDO_HMB_CODE" AS histologymorphologybehaviouroriginal,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Mapping Tumor_BodySite_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'RHB_SITE_BIOPSIE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"RHB_SITE_BIOPSIE" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySite_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySite_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity:Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Title" AS	Title,
		"Dataset_Description" AS Description,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite_LateralityQualifi:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'RHB_LAT_BIOPSIE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"RHB_LAT_BIOPSIE" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySite_LateralityQualifier' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySite_LateralityQualifier" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping MedicalHistory_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'VI_CBA_ATCD_BIOPSIP' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"VI_CBA_ATCD_BIOPSIP" AS originalValue,
		'MedicalHistory_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "MedicalHistory_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
